blocks.body: Present Simple: Adverbs of Frequency — always, usually, often, sometimes, never i miejsce tych słów w zdaniu.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"Słowa always, usually, often, sometimes, never pokazują, jak często coś się dzieje.","rules":[{"label":"Before the main verb","color":"emerald","text":"Ze zwykłym czasownikiem adverb of frequency zwykle stoi przed nim.","example":"She often walks to school."},{"label":"After be","color":"blue","text":"Z be te słowa zwykle stoją po be.","example":"He is usually tired after work."},{"label":"Meaning","color":"amber","text":"Wybierz słowo według częstotliwości, od always do never.","example":"always → usually → often → sometimes → never"}]}

{"title":"1. Najczęstsze słowa częstotliwości","intro":"Zacznij od najpopularniejszych słów.","items":[{"label":"100%","title":"always","subtitle":"I always check my homework."},{"label":"often","title":"usually / often","subtitle":"We usually eat at home. / He often calls me."},{"label":"sometimes","title":"sometimes","subtitle":"She sometimes walks to work."},{"label":"0%","title":"never","subtitle":"They never drink coffee at night."}]}

{"title":"2. Gdzie stawiać te słowa","sections":[{"label":"Przed czasownikiem głównym","color":"emerald","description":"W Present Simple adverb of frequency zwykle stoi przed zwykłym czasownikiem.","examples":[{"en":"I usually get up at seven.","ua":"Zwykle wstaję o siódmej."},{"en":"She often studies in the library.","ua":"Ona często uczy się w bibliotece."}]},{"label":"Po be","color":"blue","description":"Jeśli w zdaniu jest am / is / are, postaw słowo częstotliwości po tej formie.","examples":[{"en":"He is always late.","ua":"On zawsze się spóźnia."},{"en":"We are sometimes tired after class.","ua":"Czasami jesteśmy zmęczeni po zajęciach."}]},{"label":"W przeczeniach","color":"amber","description":"Słowo częstotliwości często stoi po don't / doesn't i przed głównym czasownikiem.","examples":[{"en":"I don't usually eat breakfast early.","ua":"Zwykle nie jem śniadania wcześnie."},{"en":"She doesn't often go out on Mondays.","ua":"Ona niezbyt często wychodzi w poniedziałki."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pozycja w zdaniu","intro":"Zobacz typowy szyk wyrazów.","rows":[{"en":"She often reads in the evening.","ua":"adverb przed głównym czasownikiem","note":"often + reads"},{"en":"He is usually at home at six.","ua":"adverb po be","note":"is + usually"},{"en":"We sometimes eat out on Fridays.","ua":"adverb przed głównym czasownikiem","note":"sometimes + eat"},{"en":"They never drive to work.","ua":"adverb przed głównym czasownikiem","note":"never + drive"}],"warning":"Po doesn't czasownik zostaje w formie podstawowej: She doesn't usually drink tea."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Stawianie słowa częstotliwości na końcu zdania.","wrong":"❌ She goes to work by bus always.","right":"✅ She always goes to work by bus."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Nie stawiać słowa częstotliwości po be.","wrong":"❌ He is late usually.","right":"✅ He is usually late."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Dodawanie -s po doesn't.","wrong":"❌ She doesn't usually drinks tea.","right":"✅ She doesn't usually drink tea."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["always, usually, often, sometimes, never pokazują częstotliwość czynności.","Ze zwykłym czasownikiem słowo częstotliwości zwykle stoi przed czasownikiem.","Z be słowo częstotliwości zwykle stoi po be.","W przeczeniach często widzimy model don't / doesn't + adverb + V1.","Typowy błąd to doesn't usually drinks zamiast doesn't usually drink."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Present Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-questions","current":false},{"label":"Adverbs of Frequency","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-adverbs-of-frequency","current":true}]}
